documentation.description: Status of simulation environment, if used

record_types.name: Sim_State

fields.name: Q1
fields.description: True attitude quaternion component 1, w (1 in null-rotation)

fields.name: Q2
fields.description: True attitude quaternion component 2, x (0 in null-rotation)

fields.name: Q3
fields.description: True attitude quaternion component 3, y (0 in null-rotation)

fields.name: Q4
fields.description: True attitude quaternion component 4, z (0 in null-rotation)

fields.name: Roll
fields.description:
Units: [rad]
Attitude roll expressed as Euler angles, not recommended except for
human-readable outputs

fields.name: Pitch
fields.description:
Units: [rad]
Attitude pitch expressed as Euler angles, not recommended except for
human-readable outputs

fields.name: Yaw
fields.description:
Units: [rad]
Attitude yaw expressed as Euler angles, not recommended except for
human-readable outputs

fields.name: Xacc
fields.description:
Units: [m/s/s]
X acceleration

fields.name: Yacc
fields.description:
Units: [m/s/s]
Y acceleration

fields.name: Zacc
fields.description:
Units: [m/s/s]
Z acceleration

fields.name: Xgyro
fields.description:
Units: [rad/s]
Angular speed around X axis

fields.name: Ygyro
fields.description:
Units: [rad/s]
Angular speed around Y axis

fields.name: Zgyro
fields.description:
Units: [rad/s]
Angular speed around Z axis

fields.name: Lat
fields.description:
Units: [deg]
Latitude (lower precision). Both this and the lat_int field should
be set.

fields.name: Lon
fields.description:
Units: [deg]
Longitude (lower precision). Both this and the lon_int field should
be set.

fields.name: Alt
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Altitude

fields.name: Std_Dev_Horz
fields.description: Horizontal position standard deviation

fields.name: Std_Dev_Vert
fields.description: Vertical position standard deviation

fields.name: Vn
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
True velocity in north direction in earth-fixed NED frame

fields.name: Ve
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
True velocity in east direction in earth-fixed NED frame

fields.name: Vd
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
True velocity in down direction in earth-fixed NED frame

fields.name: Lat_Int
fields.description:
Units: [degE7]
Latitude (higher precision). If 0, recipients should use the lat
field value (otherwise this field is preferred).

fields.name: Lon_Int
fields.description:
Units: [degE7]
Longitude (higher precision). If 0, recipients should use the lon
field value (otherwise this field is preferred).

Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.
